name: weblogic
explanation: WebLogic is a JMXFetch-based integration. The spec inherits `template: instances/jmx` and the README mandates enabling JMX on the WebLogic Platform MBean Server with `-Djavax.management.builder.initial=weblogic.management.jmx.mbeanserver.WLSMBeanServerBuilder`. Production WebLogic JMX endpoints require authentication (a WebLogic admin user/password). Per pattern I (JMXFetch integrations are categorically impossible), credentials and the specific JMX setup cannot be derived from a wire probe.
notes: Standard JMX-impossible pattern (also see jboss_wildfly, tomcat, cassandra). Default port example is 9090 but actual JMX port depends on the WebLogic admin server configuration.
